hero.name: Federico Mosqueira
hero.description: I bring structure and clarity to administrative work by organizing information, managing documents, and keeping daily operations running smoothly using Microsoft 365 tools.

value_proposition.title: Value Proposition
value_proposition.description: Administrative and back-office support focused on bringing order, clarity and structure to information and document management within Microsoft 365 environments. I work with digital tools and collaboration platforms to keep information easy to find, reliable and simple to manage across teams.

tools.title: Microsoft 365 Tool Stack
tools.description: Using Microsoft 365 and digital tools to structure information, manage documents and support daily team operations.

items.title: Structure Documents & Reduce File Chaos
items.description: Keep files, folders and shared information clear, structured and easy to navigate.
items.problem: Scattered files, duplicate versions and unclear structures that slow down daily work.
support: Structure shared folders and document libraries for clarity and consistency
Reduce time spent searching for the correct file version
Improve visibility and organization across shared information

items.title: Bring Structure to Shared Inboxes & Email Flow
items.description: Turn busy inboxes into organized and manageable workflows.
items.problem: Unclear ownership, lost emails and slow response times.
support: Organize incoming emails into clear and actionable categories
Support task ownership and follow-up visibility
Turn email communication into structured tasks

items.title: Make Tasks Visible & Trackable
items.description: Keep daily work structured, visible and under control.
items.problem: Tasks get lost in emails, deadlines are missed and responsibilities are unclear.
support: Convert daily work into clear and trackable task lists
Improve visibility of responsibilities and progress
Keep deadlines visible and easier to manage

items.title: Simplify Admin Work & Reduce Repetition
items.description: Streamline repetitive tasks and improve operational efficiency.
items.problem: Manual work, duplicated efforts and inefficient processes.
support: Standardize repetitive workflows to reduce manual effort
Create simple systems to track and manage information
Reduce errors and save time in daily operations

experience.title: Professional Experience
details: Organized digital documents and information across collaboration tools
Worked within Microsoft 365 and Google Workspace environments to support daily operations
Structured workflows and improved clarity of operational information

cta.title: Looking for a reliable assistant to bring structure to your operations?
cta.description: I help organize documents, tasks and daily office workflows using Microsoft 365 — making information easier to manage and teams easier to coordinate.
